# Example Site

> This is an example llms.txt file for testing

- [Home](https://example.com/): Main page
- [Getting Started](https://example.com/docs/getting-started): Quick start guide
- [API Reference](https://example.com/docs/api): Full API docs

## Docs

- [Authentication](https://example.com/docs/auth): OAuth2 and API keys
- [Webhooks](https://example.com/docs/webhooks): Event notifications
- [Rate Limits](https://example.com/docs/rate-limits): Usage limits

## Optional

- [Changelog](https://example.com/changelog): Recent updates
- [Status](https://status.example.com/): Service status
